title: malva lateritia
intro: Malva lateritia, also known as Rock Mallow, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its edible leaves and stems. The plant is rich in mucilages, giving it emollient and soothing properties, which are used to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Malva lateritia include its ability to calm digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and soothe respiratory problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments to harness its health benefits, such as relieving skin irritations, coughs, and sore throats.
